Class PrimitiveType

java.lang.Object
recoder.abstraction.PrimitiveType
All Implemented Interfaces:
ProgramModelElement, Type, AccessFlags, ModelElement, NamedModelElement
Direct Known Subclasses:
Bigint, Real
public class PrimitiveType extends Object implements Type
A program model element representing primitive types.
